summary: Iteration 20 — ADbakēd Advertising page + Admin lead CRUD verified end-to-end. ALL CRITICAL CHECKS PASS. /advertising renders all 10 sections with exact testid counts (6 why-cards, 6 network-platforms, 5 steps, 7 targets, 6 delivery, 5 faq items+toggles). FR↔EN locale switch updates hero title between 'SOYEZ VISIBLE PARTOUT EN LIGNE' and 'GET VISIBLE EVERYWHERE ONLINE'. Header nav has 'Publicité' link (testid: nav-link-publicit — accent stripped) between 'Nous Rejoindre' (Careers FR) and 'Contact', with active gold highlight on /advertising. Contact form happy-path works → success state shown + new DB row created. Server-side Zod validation returns 400 on missing/bad fields. Admin login → dashboard shows 8 stat tiles incl. stat-ad-leads + stat-new-ad-leads. Sidebar Advertising nav navigates to /admin/advertising; lead list renders Jane Doe + test leads; clicking row opens detail; status pills (new/contacted/qualified/closed) PATCH successfully; unread leads have ring-1 ring-brand-gold/40, click marks read (selected style switches to border-brand-gold). DELETE works. All admin API endpoints return 401 without cookie (cookie-leak proxy fix from iteration_18 intact). SEO: <title> contains 'ADbakēd' + 'bakēd Group', og:title set, JSON-LD @type='Service' present. Public regression: /, /about-us, /services, /blog, /news, /careers all 200. Seeded Jane Doe lead preserved as instructed. Two test leads created during testing were cleaned up via DELETE API.

minor.issue: Deleting a non-existent ID returns 500 instead of 404 (Prisma RecordNotFound not caught). Edge case only — happy path works.

test_results.advertising_sections: PASS — advertising-page renders. All 10 section testids present: ad-hero, ad-why, ad-network, ad-how, ad-budget, ad-targeting, ad-delivery, ad-faq, ad-contact, ad-final-cta. Cards: 6/6/5/7/6 (why/network-platforms/how-steps/targeting/delivery). 5 FAQ items + 5 toggles. ad-network-diagram visible.
test_results.hero_testids: PASS — ad-hero, ad-hero-title, ad-hero-cta-start, ad-hero-cta-expert all visible
test_results.locale_switch: PASS — FR hero='SOYEZ VISIBLE PARTOUT EN LIGNE'; EN hero='GET VISIBLE EVERYWHERE ONLINE'; round-trip back to FR works
test_results.header_nav: PASS — testids found: nav-link-accueil, nav-link-qui-sommes-nous, nav-link-nos-services, nav-link-nous-rejoindre, nav-link-publicit, nav-link-contact (order correct: Publicité between Nous Rejoindre/Careers and Contact). href=/advertising. Gold active state visible in screenshot.
test_results.contact_form_happy_path: PASS — Filled firstName/lastName/email/message and submitted. Form transitions to ad-contact-success showing 'Merci ! Nous vous contactons sous peu.' DB row created (verified via admin GET).
test_results.server_validation: PASS — POST /api/advertising with {} returns 400 with Zod errors; bad email returns 400 with 'Invalid email' message
test_results.admin_api_security: PASS — Unauth GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/advertising[/:id] = 401. Regression GET /api/admin/blog = 401. Cookie-leak proxy fix from iteration_18 intact.
test_results.admin_dashboard_tiles: PASS — 8 stat-* tiles present: stat-applications, stat-total-messages, stat-unread-messages, stat-open-positions, stat-blog-posts, stat-news-articles, stat-ad-leads, stat-new-ad-leads. NOTE: spec mentions 'dashboard-tile-*' testid pattern but actual code uses 'stat-*' — labels 'Ad leads' / 'New ad leads' both render correctly.
test_results.admin_sidebar_nav: PASS — admin-nav-advertising testid present in sidebar with Megaphone icon, routes to /admin/advertising
test_results.admin_lead_list: PASS — advertising-leads renders. 3 lead rows (after testing inserts) including Jane Doe seed. ad-lead-row-<id> testids present.
test_results.admin_lead_detail: PASS — Clicking ad-lead-row-* opens ad-lead-detail-<id> showing email, phone, company, country, message + status pills + delete button
test_results.admin_status_workflow: PASS — ad-lead-status-{new,contacted,qualified,closed} all visible; clicking 'qualified' PATCH DB; verified persisted via subsequent GET
test_results.admin_read_state: PASS — Jane Doe (unread) row had class 'ring-1 ring-brand-gold/40' before click. After clicking, PATCH read=true fires and selected row class switches to 'border-brand-gold bg-brand-gold/5'.
test_results.admin_delete: PASS — DELETE /api/admin/advertising/<id> = 200; two test-created leads cleaned up; Jane Doe preserved per instructions.
test_results.seo_title_og: PASS — <title>ADbakēd Advertising Solutions | bakēd Group</title>; og:title set
test_results.seo_jsonld: PASS — JSON-LD with @type='Service' present in HTML
test_results.regression_admin_apis: PASS — /api/admin/blog (and other admin endpoints) still 401 without cookie
test_results.empty_state_check: NOT TESTED runtime — code includes ad-leads-empty testid path (per main agent), DB always had ≥1 lead during testing (Jane Doe preserved). Code-inspection-only verification.

action_items: MINOR: DELETE /api/admin/advertising/[id] returns HTTP 500 when id does not exist (Prisma P2025 not caught). Wrap in try/catch and return 404 for a cleaner API contract. Not user-facing since UI only deletes existing rows.

INFO: Spec mentions dashboard testid pattern 'dashboard-tile-*' but implementation uses 'stat-*' (e.g. stat-ad-leads, stat-new-ad-leads). Functionally correct, just document/update the spec mapping. 8 tiles confirmed.

INFO: Header advertising nav testid is 'nav-link-publicit' (FR text 'Publicité' → accent stripped + trailing 'é' dropped by slugger). Switches to 'nav-link-advertising' in EN. Consistent with existing pattern (e.g. 'nav-link-actualit-s'), but worth noting for downstream tests.

INFO: Hydration warning ('1 error' badge bottom-left on /advertising) — appears to be a benign SSR/client mismatch (likely Date.now() in animated counters or framer-motion). Not blocking, but consider stabilising the initial values for SSR.
INFO: Sitemap does not yet include /advertising (acceptable per main agent's note, can be added next iter).
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE handler at /app/frontend/src/app/api/admin/advertising/[id]/route.ts likely throws unhandled Prisma 'Record not found' error → 500. Should catch P2025 and return 404.

Hydration mismatch on /advertising (1 error in console) — most likely animated metric counters reading window/perf timestamps during SSR. Should guard with useEffect or suppressHydrationWarning on those nodes.
Form success state correctly resets, but pressing 'Envoyer un autre message' button could be wired to reset form values — verified message visible, not flow.
All public sections use force-dynamic which precludes ISR caching; consider revalidate=300 for SEO + perf.
AdvertisingContent.tsx is likely a large single file containing all 10 sections — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting per-section into separate components for maintainability.

success_rate.backend: 100% (all critical endpoints PASS; 1 minor edge case on DELETE non-existent)

test_credentials: admin@baked.group / BakedAdmin2025! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — used for admin login flow
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test leads during the run (Test User, PlaywrightTest User) — both DELETED via API after verification. Jane Doe seed (id cmqt7mfgk00007dw10x8pzvvq) PRESERVED per instructions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All ADbakēd advertising flows verified. Key testids confirmed: advertising-page, ad-hero, ad-hero-title, ad-hero-cta-start/expert, ad-why/network/how/budget/targeting/delivery/faq/contact/final-cta, ad-why-card-{0-5}, ad-network-diagram, ad-network-platform-{0-5}, ad-step-{0-4}, ad-target-{0-6}, ad-delivery-{0-5}, ad-faq-item-{0-4}, ad-faq-toggle-{0-4}, ad-contact-firstName/lastName/email/message/submit/success, ad-final-cta. Admin: stat-ad-leads, stat-new-ad-leads (NOT dashboard-tile-*), admin-nav-advertising, advertising-leads, ad-lead-row-<id>, ad-lead-detail-<id>, ad-lead-status-{new,contacted,qualified,closed}, ad-lead-delete. Header nav adds nav-link-publicit (FR) / nav-link-advertising (EN). Login API is POST /api/auth/login. SMTP empty in .env so emails aren't sent but POST still succeeds. Jane Doe lead (cmqt7mfgk00007dw10x8pzvvq) MUST be preserved.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Only minor: Prisma P2025 not caught in DELETE handler causing 500 instead of 404 on non-existent ID.
